'''thafazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabayon|sabayon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabayon|sabayon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thafazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfæzhæth|thæfæzhæth]] || [[word:thæfæzhæj|thæfæzhæj]] || [[word:thæfæzhæsh|thæfæzhæsh]] || [[word:thæfæzhæ|thæfæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafafazhath|thafafazhath]] || [[word:thafafazhaj|thafafazhaj]] || [[word:thafafazhash|thafafazhash]] || [[word:thafafazha|thafafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafazhath|thafazhath]] || [[word:thafazhaj|thafazhaj]] || [[word:thafazhash|thafazhash]] || [[word:thafazha|thafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafzhath|thafafzhath]] || [[word:thafafzhaj|thafafzhaj]] || [[word:thafafzhash|thafafzhash]] || [[word:thafafzhaf|thafafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafazhatha|thafazhatha]] || [[word:thafazhaja|thafazhaja]] || [[word:thafazhasha|thafazhasha]] || [[word:thafazhaka|thafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafazhath|thafazhath]] || [[word:thafazhaj|thafazhaj]] || [[word:thafazhash|thafazhash]] || [[word:thafazha|thafazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafazhathal|thafazhathal]] || [[word:thafazhajal|thafazhajal]] || [[word:thafazhashal|thafazhashal]] || [[word:thafazhakal|thafazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafazhathatha|thafazhathatha]] || [[word:thafazhajaja|thafazhajaja]] || [[word:thafazhashasha|thafazhashasha]] || [[word:thafazhaka|thafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafazhathan|thafazhathan]] || [[word:thafazhajan|thafazhajan]] || [[word:thafazhashan|thafazhashan]] || [[word:thafazhakan|thafazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafazhathaoro|thafazhathaoro]] || [[word:thafazhajaoro|thafazhajaoro]] || [[word:thafazhashaoro|thafazhashaoro]] || [[word:thafazhakaoro|thafazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
